en-US.summary: Control basement TVs with voice commands
examplePhrases: Alexa, tell TV Control to turn on all TVs
Alexa, ask TV Control to launch Netflix
Alexa, tell TV Control to reset antenna
en-US.name: TV Control
en-US.description: Control your basement entertainment system. Power on/off Fire TVs, launch streaming apps on Roku, reset to antenna, and search for content.
